---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, new L1/L2 pattern, new language for the stack-trace filter, or a new editor hook.
title: "[feat] <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!-- What output is NTK leaving on the table? What category of
command / log / trace is currently wasting tokens? Paste a concrete
example if possible. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What should happen? Where in the pipeline does it fit
(L1 regex, L2 tokenizer, L3 prompt, L4 context injection)? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why this one fits best. -->

## Scope hints

- [ ] This can be done by adding/updating a fixture in `bench/fixtures/`
- [ ] This needs an L1 regex / framework pattern
- [ ] This needs L2 tokenizer work
- [ ] This needs an L3 prompt change
- [ ] This needs an L4 context-format change
- [ ] This needs an editor hook port
- [ ] This is a docs / i18n change
- [ ] Other (explain)

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can write the fix myself — point me at the right file
- [ ] I can test / review a PR
- [ ] I just want to flag it

## Additional context

<!-- Links, screenshots, before/after ratios, anything else. -->
